treatment_information.treatment_response: Pain well-controlled; incision healing well with staples

treatment_timeline.event: Post-operative assessment showed stable vital signs and well-controlled pain

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory - requires assistance or aid (walker or cane)
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with primary physician regarding this admission and any new medications and refills; staples to be removed at first clinic visit.
